source.title: What Happens If a Renter Disappears or Loses Their Wallet?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What Happens If a Renter Disappears or Loses Their Wallet?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text: A maximum rental period of 24 Days is enforced to protect fleet owners. In cases where a renter loses access to their wallet or disappears, the system automatically returns the fleet to the owner once the rental period ends. This safeguard ensures that you are not left without control over your asset.

claims.text: A maximum rental period of 24 Days is enforced to protect fleet owners.
